# InMemoryTaskStore.Cancel method

Requests cancellation of a task (§25.9). A non-terminal task transitions to Cancelled.

```csharp
public bool Cancel(string taskId)
```

| parameter | description |

| taskId | The task id. |

## Return Value

`true` if the task existed.
